response.original_title: Caillou and Boris: The Next Big Thing of War
response.overview: Two new villains, named Amy and Steven Schneider, want to rule over the entire of Canada, and forced the nation to kill Caillou and Boris! But the army won't step back! They know they're in protection in the name of the Lord! And they know his power will protect them all! So they fight against the two villains! Doris helps,  and Rosie? She is a constant troublemaker! At the end she stops causing trouble!
response.title: Caillou and Boris: The Next Big Thing of War
